translated: ProSeka really does a great job showing so many different sides of the characters.
They really do.
Speaking as a fan myself,
seeing such a wide range for the characters...
I bet there were people who literally fell out of their chairs because it was so beautiful.
Right?
I mean, you would fall over seeing this.
It's seriously mind-blowing.
I was surprised too.
I saw it trending on X earlier.
I figured it had to be something about ProSeka.
The banner had just been revealed, and I happened to see it right then.
When the official account posted the image for Shizuku's event banner on X,
everyone's reactions were just incredible.
It made me so happy.
Okay everyone, it's almost time to start.
About ten seconds left.
I'm so nervous!
I'm glad I get to enjoy this with all of you.
So, what did you all think?
